creator: dmgk@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to uros from comment #3)
Thanks for the update!

Instead of shar, could you please attach a diff against the current ports tree [1]?

Also, the attached shar seems to have the same content as the currently committed sysutils/datadog-agent 7.23.1_1 port.

[1] https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/book.html#svn-diff
